statement: In every magma, Equation 239 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * y`) implies Equation 1262 (`x = x * (((y * z) * y) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0825
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op (op y z) y) x))
